Donor Movement

FY25–26

How this year's donor base compares to prior giving history: donors who are new to giving, donors retained from last year, donors who came back after lapsing, and donors at risk of or already lost.

LYBUNT & SYBUNT Donor Rosters

FY25–26

LYBUNT — gave Last Year But Not This year (one-year lapse, highest-priority re-engagement). SYBUNT — gave in Some Year But Not This year (any prior lapse, broader pool). Rosters below also include New and Recaptured donors where available. Sorted by most recent gift amount; search narrows by donor name.

DonorLast Gift DateLast Gift Amount
No donors in this category.
Source: FY24_GIFTS.xlsx, FY25_GIFTS.xlsx, FY26_GIFTS.xlsx (gift-level export, Gf_Amount / Gf_Date / Gf_Gift_status / Gf_CnBio_ID). Terminated gifts are excluded from revenue, gift counts, and donor rosters. Fiscal year runs July 1 – June 30. New / Retained / Recaptured / Lapsing (LYBUNT) / Lost (part of SYBUNT) donor categories are derived by comparing each year's unique donor set against prior years' donor sets; categories requiring more prior-year history than is available are marked N/A.
